recentEvaluations.rationale: This post is a general product update and does not mention limits, caps, or usage becoming available again.
recentEvaluations.tweetText:
Today, the OpenAI product and engineering team is humming, there is so much to coordinate and keep running across the release of GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, ChatGPT Work, the new ChatGPT desktop app, hosted sites and a million other things... together with the new ChatGPT Voice just launched yesterday.

We will not get it all right, give us feedback and we will iterate quickly. Thank you for being an amazing community.

recentEvaluations.rationale: This reply contains only a link and provides no explicit evidence that limits have reset.

recentEvaluations.rationale: This is a product rollout announcement, not a statement that usage limits or rate caps have reset.
recentEvaluations.tweetText:
ChatGPT Work is now rolled out to 100% of our Pro users. Open the ChatGPT mobile app on a phone near you and enjoy productivity on the go. Or install the new ChatGPT desktop app if you need full access to your apps, browser and local files.

One advice: Raise your ambition. GPT 5.6 Sol is different from what you might have seen before. 👀

recentEvaluations.tweetText:
ChatGPT Work brings the power of agents to everyone. It works across mobile, web and desktop. 

We have seen fast adoption within OpenAI and virtually 100% of our staff uses it on a regularly to do everything from finance, recruiting, comms, marketing, product ideation and coordination and so much more.

recentEvaluations.rationale: This post is just praising a model and does not mention limits, caps, or usage becoming available again.
recentEvaluations.tweetText:
GPT 5.6 Sol is our best model so far at ~everything. 

It's remarkable how stark the difference is with GPT-5.5 across coding, hard context and strategy tasks, building sites, ... and literally anything I need to get done. Totally requires raising the ambition of what you try.
